## How it was tested

<!-- Commands you ran. At minimum `make test`; `make audit` for non-trivial changes. -->

- [ ] `make lint` clean (or `make audit` for larger changes)
- [ ] Touches the semantic path? Verified `make build-embed` still compiles
- [ ] Docs updated (README / docs/) if behavior or flags changed
